title: Family Health Care
text:
Family Health Care Skip to content Welcome to Family Health Care Book Appointment Home About Us Services Gallery Career Contact Us Call Us 8595 102 102 Family Health Care Home Nursing Service Family Health Care is known for providing the best nursing bureau services as our special objective is to help people live safe home lives with freedom of comfort. Our aim is that we can deliver the highest quality home care nursing services to you. We believe that our clients and their families deserve healthcare services with compassion, excellence, and genuineness. We provide qualified nurses and trained attendants who will look after your loved one to suit your medical condition. Our nurses have years of experience in their jobs, ranging from managing medical equipment, supervising and handling medical equipment. These professionals are trained in hygiene, behavior, etiquette, time, stress management, communication, and interpersonal skills. Why Choose Us? Our healthcare professionals are dedicated to providing the best possible care for patients and are supported by complete radiology and imaging services provided at Kalium. Checkups We do regular check-ups for you with our best doctors at your home. Medical Advice Need advice for your health, consult any of our doctors by visiting our clinic. 24/7 Emergency We are available for you every day throughout the year. New Facilities Our clinic is equipped with new high technology facilities. Professional Doctors Kalium Clinic doctors are among the best doctors in their department. Patient Care Our helpful staff takes care of each patient offering a personal nurse. Our Partner Dr. Sanjay Kumar Choudhary Doctor M.B.B.S, M.D,D.M(Neuro), A.I.I.M.S. Sr.Consultant, Chief & Co-Ordinator Dr. Suraj Prakash Doctor MBBS, MS(Ortho), M.CH(ORTHO) the UK, Empanelled Senior Consultant-Orthopedics Dr. Rakhi Gupta Doctor MBBS ,MD (Obs & Gyn) FICOG,FICMCH,FIMSA,FOG (France), MAMSMIEIC Gold Medalist Gynae Endoscopy Surgeon Dr. Vijay Lakshmi Rawat Doctor MBBS, MD - Obstetrics & Gynaecology, 22 years experience overall Gynecologist, Obstetrician Dr. Kaberi Banerjee Director Fertility & IVF Specialist MBBS(AIIMS), MD(AIIMS) DNB MRCOG(UK) Commonwealth Fellow In Reproductive Medicine Dr. Ramdev Gupta General Physician M.B.B.S (Patna), HS-Surgery APVIC-CARDIOLOGY (INDIA) Dr. S.K Jain Doctor M.D, D.M.Gastro(AIIMS)f.I.A.M.S., F.I.M.S.A., F.A.C.G.(USA) Former Professor & Head of Gastroenterology Dr. Neena Bahl Doctor M.B.B.S, M.D GOLD Medalist president Silver Medalist, Senior Consultant, Gynaecologist & Obstetrician We Are Happily Serving In New Delhi NCR Faridabad Ghaziabad Gurugram Mumbai Goa Pune Lucknow Chennai Kolkata Bangalore Chandigarh Amritsar Ludhiana Hyderabad Indore Jaipur Ahmedabad Patna Cochin WELCOME TO FHC-SERVICES WORLD-CLASS MEDICAL SERVICES FOR YOUR FAMILY Family Health Care works in association with a professional network of doctors, nurses, hospitals, and diagnostic centers, to provide you quality healthcare advantages. We strive to offer you proven, friendly, efficient, and compassionate healthcare right in your comfort zone. What we offer you is more than just healthcare. At the root, our services are professional, quality-centered, and filled with love and compassion. Quick Enquiry What Our Client Says! Deepak Bajaj B-54, the Icon, Gurgaon We have been using the services of attendants provided to us by "Family Health Care" for about four years. They have given good services and provided decent attendants. We wish them all the success for the future Mr.Madhur My mother-in-law has arthritis and needs regular Physiotherapy.
